name: Lemon Filling for Cream Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks in a bowl.
2. Gradually add lemon juice, zest, salt, and sugar while continuously beating.
3. Mix in the cornstarch mixture (cold water and cornstarch) until well combined.
4. Stir in the hot water.
5. Cook over a double boiler for 20 minutes or until thickened. Use an instant-read thermometer to check that it reaches 160°F (71°C).
6. Remove from heat and cover with plastic wrap directly on top of the custard to prevent a skin from forming.
7. Allow to cool completely before using.
